first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions identify the candidate's strong software engineering background but note a critical lack of experience in the specific hardware, SoC, and AI accelerator domains required for the role. The shift in dates, implying more years of experience for the variant, did not alter this core, job-relevant assessment. The differences in wording are minor paraphrasing and well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise.
